entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Civics Coach is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.

entries.source: The film has a text transcript, timed captions, and chapter markers on the page.
entries.value: El video incluye una transcripción de texto, subtítulos con marcas de tiempo y marcadores de capítulos en la página.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: La película pasa de la inspiración a la promesa práctica: un compañero paciente de aprendizaje con AI.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: first layer is el juego de roles. It puede speak in an accessible voice, explicar motives, and hacer el situation vivid. Esto is el part eso ayudars memoria.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: El flujo verifica cada paso, señala errores y conecta los procedimientos con el concepto.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: La página formal de privacidad sobre uso de datos, derechos y condiciones del servicio público.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Los términos formales que cubren el uso aceptable, las responsabilidades de la cuenta y las condiciones del servicio.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: El formato debe servir a la tarea de aprendizaje.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: El formato funciona porque permite que los estudiantes hagan preguntas como:

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: El objetivo es la confianza

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: goal is descubrimiento and citation of público aprendizaje pages. Public rutas, guías, and aprendizaje hubs are open to major IA búsqueda, retrieval, and assistant rastleerores, mientras API, admin, reset, and privado utility rutas stay disallowed.

entries.source: The goal is not only to rank. It is to make the first click useful for a learner and easy for search engines to understand.
entries.value: goal is no solo to rank. It is to hacer el first click usarful for a estudiante and easy for búsqueda engines to understand.

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: goal is not to hacer people passive in front of IA. goal is to dar every estudiante a patient first place to preguntar, practicar, get comentarios, try again, and construir confianza.

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: goal is not to hacer el IA el authority. goal is to hacer estudiantes preguntar better historical preguntas.

entries.source: The history route gives learners the liveliness of role-play and debate while preserving the warning that simulations are not primary sources.
entries.value: history route dars estudiantes el liveliness of role-play and debate mientras preserving el warning eso simulations are not primary fuentes.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Los modos de tareas y socrático están diseñados en torno a pistas, razonamiento, comprobaciones de pasos y explicaciones del estudiante, en lugar de simplemente entregar respuestas terminadas.

entries.source: The homework route makes the contract visible: ask for a hint, check a step, improve a draft, critique a source, then prove the learning with review.
entries.value: La ruta de tareas hace visible el acuerdo: pide una pista, comprueba un paso, mejora un borrador, critica una fuente y luego demuestra el aprendizaje con repaso.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: important constraint is restraint. A Socratic IA tutor debe not dump el respuesta at el first sign of struggle. It debe hacer effort easier to sustain.

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: important move is to empezar con a real aprendizaje job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion puede ayudar shape el ruta once you begin.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: La tarea no consiste solo en responder

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: El viaje permanece anclado en el estado y la evidencia: lo que se conoce, lo que se reconstruye, lo que es especulativo y a lo que tu identidad puede acceder de manera realista.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: last prompt matters. Socratic aprendizaje debe end con synthesis. After el preguntas, el estudiante debe be able to say what changed in their thinking.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: El estudiante todavía tiene que hacer el esfuerzo de recordar. Ese es el punto.

entries.source: The learning jobs this page is built to answer.
entries.value: Las tareas de aprendizaje que esta página está pensada para responder.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Las reglas robots en vivo usadas por rastreadores de búsqueda y sistemas de recuperación de IA.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: La superficie de aprendizaje pública y rastreable que convierte la misión en comportamiento de producto.

entries.source: The map exposes clear relationships between search intent, public learning modes, prompt starters, guides, and review loops, while private saved chats stay excluded from discovery.
entries.value: map exposes clear relationships between búsqueda intent, público aprendizaje modos, prompt empezarers, guías, and repaso loops, mientras privado saved chats stay excluded from descubrimiento.

entries.source: The map is the connective tissue between AI tutor searches, homework help, study prompts, learning paths, and the public chat modes that answer those needs.
entries.value: El mapa es el tejido conectivo entre búsquedas de tutores de IA, ayuda con tareas, indicaciones de estudio, rutas de aprendizaje y los modos públicos de chat que responden a esas necesidades.

entries.source: The Math Step Coach is built for step checks, hints, and reasoning. It is most useful when you share what you tried and ask it to help you understand the next step.
entries.value: Entrenador de pasos de matemáticas está construido para comprobar pasos, dar pistas y apoyar el razonamiento. Es más útil cuando compartes lo que intentaste y le pides que te ayude a entender el siguiente paso.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: La sección central presenta inspir alrededor de la comprensión, las pistas, los cuestionarios y los ciclos de aprendizaje activo.

entries.source: The mission has stayed steady: make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: mission has stayed steady: hacer aprendizaje accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and usarful for anyone con curiosidad and an internet conectarion.

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: La misión está conectada con superficies reales del producto.

entries.source: The mode designs vivid locations, paths, and retrieval cues instead of asking you to reread notes.
entries.value: Este modo diseña ubicaciones, rutas y pistas de recuperación vívidas en lugar de pedirte que releas tus notas.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Este modo mantiene la sesión interactiva, alternando entre explicaciones, pasos prácticos, comprobaciones y correcciones.

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Las herramientas de aprendizaje con IA más útiles comparten algunos hábitos:

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: next phase is open-fuente, contributor-friendly, and conectared to el wider international construirout at inspir.uk.

entries.source: The next-generation AI study platform.
entries.value: La plataforma de estudio con AI de próxima generación.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: La reconstrucción de código abierto para desarrolladores, educadores y colaboradores.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: Los primeros planos plantean el aprendizaje como algo que cualquiera debería poder empezar de inmediato.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: pages do not expose privado conversacións. Ellos organizar público modos, indicaciones, guías, flujo de trabajos, and safety boundaries so a estudiante puede empezar in el right place.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: El planificador prioriza las áreas débiles, añade ciclos de repaso y crea planes de respaldo para los días perdidos.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: plataforma está diseñado para ayudar people razonar, practicar, recordar, and explicar ideas back en lugar de collecting finished respuestas.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: plataforma worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured aprendizaje flows, and early IA tutoring experiences.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. point is to match el aprendizaje job to el behavior eso ayudars fastest.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: point is not to hacer every lesson a puzzle. point is to elegir el right amount of struggle.

entries.source: The point is not to use AI less. It is to use it in a way that leaves you with stronger understanding after the session.
entries.value: point is not to usar IA less. It is to usar it in a way eso leaves you con stronger comprensión después de el session.

entries.source: The practical trust layer behind guest mode.
entries.value: practical trust layer behind invitado modo.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: producto debe teach, no solo respuesta.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: promise is not eso IA puede summon el past. It puedenot. promise is eso juego de roles puede hacer contexto easier to pregunta, compare, and recordar when el experience is clearly separated from evidencia.

entries.source: The prompt searches this library is built to answer.
entries.value: prompt búsquedaes esto biblioteca está construido para respuesta.

entries.source: The prompts are designed to start active learning loops: explanation, Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, critique, debate, planning, and review.
entries.value: Los indicaciones están diseñados para iniciar ciclos de aprendizaje activo: explicación, preguntas socráticas, pistas para tareas, cuestionarios, tarjetas, crítica, debate, planificación y repaso.

entries.source: The public AI chats in this path.
entries.value: público IA chats in esto ruta.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: público blog contains more than 100 guías, prompt loops, and pillar clusters conectared to live aprendizaje modos.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: público explanation of why inspir exists and why aprendizaje access matters.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: público inspir plataforma ayudars estudiantes practicar extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments puede be customised alrededor de each escuela’s contenido, flujo de trabajos, and estudiante contexto.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Los modos públicos están diseñados alrededor de comportamientos de aprendizaje: pistas, preguntas socráticas, comprobaciones de pasos, cuestionarios, tarjetas, comentarios de escritura, ciclos de repaso y explicación activa.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: público producto dars anyone a place to empezar mientras escuela and partner deployments puede adapt el experience for local necesitans.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: público producto is easy to try first, mientras escuelas and partners puede explore tailored deployments for community necesitans.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: público producto manteners aprendizaje easy to try, mientras escuelas and CSR partners puede apoyar tailored deployments when communities necesitan confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: público producto stays easy to try: estudiantes puede land directly on a aprendizaje modo and begin as a invitado. Schools and CSR partners puede apoyar tailored deployments when communities necesitan confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: público producto, el escuela rutaway, and el contenido biblioteca debe all point back to el same principle: aprendizaje debe stay active, accessible, and usarful.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for search intent, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: El sitio público está estructurado como un mapa de aprendizaje: modos en vivo para ayuda inmediata, centros de materias para la intención de búsqueda y guías que convierten la lectura en acción.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: público statement of why inspir exists and what aprendizaje access means.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: pregunta is not whether IA debe be part of estudioing. For many estudiantes it alleery is. better pregunta is whether el tool is ayudaring you construir memoria, judgment, and confianza, or quietly removing el exact struggle eso hacers aprendizaje stick.

entries.source: The questions this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: preguntas esto hub está construido para respuesta.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: El modo de cuestionario oculta las respuestas hasta que respondes, y luego convierte cada error en un punto de repaso.

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: La regla de seguridad

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: El mismo tutor de IA puede ser una pista para tareas, un ciclo de explicación supervisado por familias, una superficie de evaluación docente o un coach de autoestudio. La página debe dejarlo claro.

entries.source: The same topic can need a different prompt depending on whether the learner needs an explanation, a hint, a quiz, a debate, or a plan.
entries.value: same topic puede necesitan a different prompt depending on whether el estudiante necesitans an explanation, a pista, a cuestionario, a debate, or a plan.

entries.value: escuela rutaway for tailored IA aprendizaje spaces and funded access.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: second card hacers el estudiante retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of estos jobs:

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: second layer is el evidencia note. It debe say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for aprendizaje. Esto is el part eso protects accuracy.

entries.source: The security of your data is important to us but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
entries.value: security of your datos is important to us but recordar eso no method of transmission over el Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to usar commercially acceptable means to protect your Datos personales, we puedenot guarantee its absolute security.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: self-estudio challenge is no solo finding information. It is choosing el next right action and knowing whether el idea actually stuck.

entries.source: The SEO system is designed to make useful public learning resources findable while keeping private user material, admin surfaces, and utility routes outside discovery.
entries.value: SEO system está diseñado para hacer usarful público aprendizaje refuentes findable mientras mantenering privado usarr material, admin superficies, and utility rutas outside descubrimiento.

entries.source: The session should follow this loop: {value1}. If the AI skips straight to the finish, ask it to slow down and check your reasoning first.
entries.value: session debe follow esto loop: {value1}. If el IA skips straight to el finish, preguntar it to slow down and comprobar your razonaring first.

entries.source: The session should move through explanation, your attempt, feedback, repair, and a short proof of understanding.
entries.value: session debe move mediante explanation, your attempt, comentarios, repair, and a short proof of comprensión.

entries.source: The short version: inspir grew from a learning community into a public AI learning product organized around active, mode-specific teaching.
entries.value: short version: inspir grew from a aprendizaje community into a público IA aprendizaje producto organizard alrededor de active, modo-specific teaching.

entries.source: The site is a route, not a brochure.
entries.value: El sitio es una ruta, no un folleto.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from Facebook quizzes and student communities to a free AI learning platform built in public.
entries.value: La historia de inspir, desde cuestionarios de Facebook y comunidades estudiantiles hasta una plataforma gratuita de aprendizaje con IA construida en público.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from public quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: La historia de inspir, desde cuestionarios públicos y comunidades estudiantiles hasta herramientas gratuitas de aprendizaje con IA construidas en público.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: story spans cuestionariozes, offline escuela networks, curriculum ingestion, and público IA aprendizaje modos.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: strongest angle is free público IA aprendizaje eso opens directly in invitado modo and manteners estudiantes active mediante modo-specific teaching en vez de generic respuesta generation.

entries.source: The strongest proof of the mission is not a claim on a page. It is the public learning surface: guest modes, study paths, long-form guides, and school pathways that connect back to real learner needs.
entries.value: strongest proof of el mission is not a afirmación on a page. It is el público aprendizaje superficie: invitado modos, estudio rutas, long-form guías, and escuela rutaways eso conectar back to real estudiante necesitans.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: strongest preguntas are not trivia preguntas. Ellos are contexto preguntas.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: strongest SEO pages do not strand a estudiante. Ellos conectar el audience intent to rutas, flujo de trabajos, guías, and repeatable repaso.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: strongest estudiante flujo de trabajo is not respuesta-copying. It is a loop: explicar el stuck point, preguntar one better pregunta, get a pista, try again, then repaso el miss.

entries.source: The subject hub links directly to focused chat entrypoints such as Math Step Coach and Writing Coach.
entries.value: subject hub links directly to focusard chat puntos de entrada such as Entrenador de pasos de matemáticas and Writing Coach.

entries.source: The subject searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: subject búsquedaes esto hub está construido para respuesta.

entries.source: The terms that describe acceptable use, account responsibilities, and public service conditions for inspir.
entries.value: terms eso describe acceptable usar, account responsibilities, and público service conditions for inspir.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: transfer step is el key. If you puede only solve el exact problem el IA just walked mediante, you have learned el example. If you puede solve a cousin of el problem, you are empezaring to learn el idea.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: El tutor hace una pregunta a la vez, espera a que razones y sintetiza la información solo después de que lo hayas intentado.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: El tutor te pregunta qué esperas que haga el código y luego utiliza ejemplos breves y pruebas para que comprendas el comportamiento.

entries.source: The tutor translates abstract material into story structure while keeping the underlying concept visible.
entries.value: El tutor traduce material abstracto en una estructura narrativa manteniendo visible el concepto subyacente.

entries.source: These URLs are stable entrypoints for the mission, product surface, learning content, and open-source work.
entries.value: Estos URLs are stable puntos de entrada for el mission, producto superficie, aprendizaje contenido, and open-fuente work.

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Ellos adapt el level sin making el estudiante feel small.

entries.source: They are real public guest-mode entrypoints. Each mode has a canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URL, visible starter prompts, learning guidance, and structured data for search engines.
entries.value: Ellos are real público invitado-modo puntos de entrada. Each modo has a puedeonical /chat/{topicSlug} URL, visible empezarer indicaciones, aprendizaje guidance, and structured datos for búsqueda engines.

entries.source: They are written for inspir's public learning modes, but the patterns also show how to ask AI for better explanations, hints, questions, practice, and feedback.
entries.value: Ellos are written for inspir's público aprendizaje modos, but el patterns also mostrar how to preguntar IA for better explanations, pistas, preguntas, práctica, and comentarios.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Ellos preguntar preguntas when el goal is unclear.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Ellos encourage práctica, no solo leering.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Ellos dar examples eso match el estudiante's world.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Ellos hacer uncertainty visible when facts necesitan comprobaring.

entries.source: Third, the tutor reads the answer. A useful AI tutor should not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It should identify the claim, the assumption, the gap, or the misconception.
entries.value: Third, el tutor leers el respuesta. A usarful IA tutor debe not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It debe identify el afirmación, el assumption, el gap, or el misconception.

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.

entries.source: This further went on to show that Oppression, Wealth Concentration or any other trait is present across the world. Whites oppressed blacks, Brahmins oppressed Dalits, the 1% controls more wealth than the bottom 90% almost everywhere.

entries.source: This gives school leaders a low-friction way to evaluate the learning experience before committing to content work, staff workflows, or funded access.
entries.value: Esto dars escuela leaders a low-friction way to evaluate el aprendizaje experience antes de committing to contenido work, staff flujo de trabajos, or funded access.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Esto is not a afirmación eso estudiantes debe abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson biblioteca and a live IA aprendizaje modo work best together: learn el foundation, then usar inspir to preguntar preguntas, repair confusion, practicar recall, or get unstuck.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Esto is el same habit behind estudioing con IA sin cheating yourself: mantener el estudiante active. IA is most usarful when it dars you comentarios on your thinking.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Por eso inspir está construido alrededor de modos de aprendizaje. A veces necesitas una explicación clara. A veces necesitas preguntas socráticas. A veces necesitas un cuestionario, tarjetas, práctica de debate, un coach de escritura o un juego de roles histórico.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Esto matters for escuelas and families porque el first barrier is often not talent. It is el cost of ayudar, el fear of preguntaring a "basic" pregunta, or el lack of a patient person at el exact moment confusion appears. A free público companion lowers el cost of beginning.
